jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at NSDL
jsonLd.description:
We at NSDL are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSDL:
NSDL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDL!
